	+ (1365*x^63 + 9555*x^62 + 48685*x^61 - 9433125*x^60 + 41505051*x^59 - 163914316*x^58 + 282515438*x^57 - 401815748*x^56 - 245945637*x^55 + 1027997031*x^54 - 2445365133*x^53 + 1561004599*x^52 + 866294066*x^51 - 6055188811*x^50 + 22451029309*x^49 - 78976136013*x^48 + 194441243608*x^47 - 450796400890*x^46 + 538401962862*x^45 - 643408625613*x^44 - 306639513443*x^43 + 1037964943341*x^42 - 2845478688709*x^41 + 2822666914257*x^40 - 2333844504883*x^39 + 486104607127*x^38 + 2461410127803*x^37 - 1738392213825*x^36 + 4279269892256*x^35 + 704600003622*x^34 + 2048298865847*x^33 + 1769294172576*x^32 - 750445177942*x^31 - 2211571833670*x^30 - 4171724369402*x^29 - 6254653964598*x^28 - 4387709128044*x^27 - 2991835316629*x^26 + 3174144431833*x^25 + 7640680663640*x^24 + 12264028556631*x^23 + 13716232281126*x^22 + 11123875995074*x^21 + 6797197669366*x^20 + 190963172156*x^19 - 4651783723900*x^18 - 8091255058996*x^17 - 8684278852489*x^16 - 7628408215203*x^15 - 5561544107164*x^14 - 3506663186324*x^13 - 1910242668625*x^12 - 912236506434*x^11 - 386905781298*x^10 - 152572285892*x^9 - 60004956745*x^8 - 25273326059*x^7 - 11076789786*x^6 - 4645524446*x^5 - 1705340848*x^4 - 521701746*x^3 - 126970858*x^2 - 22289652*x - 2324784)*y^15
	- (455*x^61 + 3640*x^60 + 18900*x^59 - 7642939*x^58 + 30268358*x^57 - 111089935*x^56 + 166416063*x^55 - 209971902*x^54 - 187206792*x^53 + 520766224*x^52 - 1029844955*x^51 + 386352919*x^50 + 385410874*x^49 - 3380654793*x^48 + 10607494523*x^47 - 51804494805*x^46 + 111755120991*x^45 - 276167325738*x^44 + 311888458060*x^43 - 399132396812*x^42 - 40275208295*x^41 + 386001791686*x^40 - 1070677420989*x^39 + 1249331051732*x^38 - 825929475307*x^37 + 568853328147*x^36 + 823763441500*x^35 - 170355514811*x^34 + 1236933238685*x^33 + 106554404826*x^32 + 219393775566*x^31 - 266992130258*x^30 - 901990759861*x^29 - 1265431196732*x^28 - 1138527213935*x^27 - 888664212992*x^26 + 623211491486*x^25 + 1531972108921*x^24 + 3236930899995*x^23 + 3495565092062*x^22 + 3430448953460*x^21 + 2201894797679*x^20 + 541315777770*x^19 - 993525604534*x^18 - 2198173568345*x^17 - 2567791670966*x^16 - 2433926662280*x^15 - 1860614452628*x^14 - 1237821207548*x^13 - 696279749380*x^12 - 340868748243*x^11 - 141611213395*x^10 - 51428684970*x^9 - 16576448372*x^8 - 5402501184*x^7 - 1951406141*x^6 - 779763757*x^5 - 290077773*x^4 - 90399205*x^3 - 22501745*x^2 - 4062303*x - 435897)*y^14
	+ (105*x^59 + 945*x^58 + 5100*x^57 - 5289824*x^56 + 18517098*x^55 - 62836289*x^54 + 78167355*x^53 - 86855535*x^52 - 117039182*x^51 + 200249114*x^50 - 359247317*x^49 - 54827500*x^48 - 100971299*x^47 - 2022855346*x^46 + 4385075746*x^45 - 29969283336*x^44 + 57228696462*x^43 - 143940297969*x^42 + 159853704596*x^41 - 199430802098*x^40 + 36594956204*x^39 + 129319464812*x^38 - 320036850272*x^37 + 468913360002*x^36 - 226889175582*x^35 + 270396418025*x^34 + 214943795816*x^33 + 7031007999*x^32 + 222782877235*x^31 - 68273299599*x^30 - 97711742301*x^29 - 213863487672*x^28 - 246632120281*x^27 - 183406786412*x^26 + 77612262232*x^25 + 293312881643*x^24 + 722483413835*x^23 + 786538335703*x^22 + 920701440085*x^21 + 591870199440*x^20 + 284450155202*x^19 - 178931157806*x^18 - 501787465118*x^17 - 676590012778*x^16 - 683515670838*x^15 - 556898441650*x^14 - 391412059883*x^13 - 230923242266*x^12 - 118222659791*x^11 - 50351879482*x^10 - 18186092648*x^9 - 5320335552*x^8 - 1348650794*x^7 - 332764335*x^6 - 107416738*x^5 - 40408796*x^4 - 12804910*x^3 - 3253915*x^2 - 602805*x - 66045)*y^13
	- (15*x^57 + 150*x^56 + 851*x^55 - 3120909*x^54 + 9386751*x^53 - 29477019*x^52 + 27946061*x^51 - 28453997*x^50 - 59833072*x^49 + 47978593*x^48 - 116790297*x^47 - 131271933*x^46 - 259739595*x^45 - 1170939037*x^44 + 1677066286*x^43 - 14883205729*x^42 + 26312380846*x^41 - 63701319169*x^40 + 72140429207*x^39 - 81757041061*x^38 + 34618767845*x^37 + 38779507415*x^36 - 73534205338*x^35 + 144838043553*x^34 - 49682283414*x^33 + 82893510179*x^32 + 38162426484*x^31 - 195911957*x^30 + 16542838779*x^29 - 33585441538*x^28 - 33617821194*x^27 - 29414545587*x^26 + 6233880303*x^25 + 55250210989*x^24 + 133466720994*x^23 + 161452613696*x^22 + 205716137610*x^21 + 139364230447*x^20 + 96136717205*x^19 - 25261242154*x^18 - 92897939160*x^17 - 158827004716*x^16 - 166495562162*x^15 - 148723958165*x^14 - 109275224848*x^13 - 68913186633*x^12 - 36975666629*x^11 - 16652618124*x^10 - 6218161024*x^9 - 1842462690*x^8 - 416554746*x^7 - 71231807*x^6 - 11664426*x^5 - 4427681*x^4 - 1424151*x^3 - 368906*x^2 - 69966*x - 7770)*y^12
	+ (x^55 + 11*x^54 + 66*x^53 - 1561989*x^52 + 3865576*x^51 - 11376937*x^50 + 6717568*x^49 - 7887607*x^48 - 25260417*x^47 - 1161537*x^46 - 44187754*x^45 - 92124602*x^44 - 199858381*x^43 - 587225869*x^42 + 645368696*x^41 - 6264893561*x^40 + 10842522061*x^39 - 23907854327*x^38 + 28251250529*x^37 - 27765644184*x^36 + 17499324256*x^35 + 10030324639*x^34 - 12024639827*x^33 + 35910752281*x^32 - 8696964252*x^31 + 18018731073*x^30 + 4129622505*x^29 - 886511724*x^28 - 327898482*x^27 - 3320872791*x^26 + 1698863519*x^25 + 9630685336*x^24 + 21235656912*x^23 + 29661813936*x^22 + 37740313621*x^21 + 29346134396*x^20 + 23410990869*x^19 - 1487667522*x^18 - 13705588065*x^17 - 32675181162*x^16 - 34822549415*x^15 - 35124420769*x^14 - 26556387521*x^13 - 18297794490*x^12 - 10197781159*x^11 - 4974763328*x^10 - 1932841768*x^9 - 618775938*x^8 - 138710888*x^7 - 22319947*x^6 - 936507*x^5 - 357894*x^4 - 116651*x^3 - 30766*x^2 - 5958*x - 666)*y^11
	+ (657800*x^50 - 1249820*x^49 + 3585010*x^48 - 511290*x^47 + 2333240*x^46 + 9043775*x^45 + 7622407*x^44 + 19773219*x^43 + 45413958*x^42 + 99889388*x^41 + 240743120*x^40 - 260447157*x^39 + 2225824138*x^38 - 3956047395*x^37 + 7591261485*x^36 - 9435039402*x^35 + 7826151166*x^34 - 6304513042*x^33 - 2159901174*x^32 + 974949600*x^31 - 7072935689*x^30 + 1019164753*x^29 - 3062819742*x^28 - 525052727*x^27 - 415976669*x^26 - 811710464*x^25 - 1608507121*x^24 - 3122752810*x^23 - 4654942901*x^22 - 5792175220*x^21 - 5302416652*x^20 - 4296666867*x^19 - 521096856*x^18 + 1676189922*x^17 + 5699485656*x^16 + 6256868157*x^15 + 7198846543*x^14 + 5556821153*x^13 + 4256204652*x^12 + 2437522739*x^11 + 1313650139*x^10 + 526923361*x^9 + 188329557*x^8 + 43077723*x^7 + 8003202*x^6 + 49434*x^5 + 18975*x^4 + 6258*x^3 + 1679*x^2 + 331*x + 37)*y^10
	- (230230*x^48 - 296010*x^47 + 920920*x^46 + 394420*x^45 + 888940*x^44 + 2858245*x^43 + 4233173*x^42 + 8257072*x^41 + 17488006*x^40 + 36781662*x^39 + 78683966*x^38 - 104411742*x^37 + 666215879*x^36 - 1255061885*x^35 + 2027022105*x^34 - 2644293389*x^33 + 1815143331*x^32 - 1734593299*x^31 - 388935828*x^30 - 154852206*x^29 - 1118172819*x^28 - 18286544*x^27 - 483613267*x^26 - 212384211*x^25 - 313416324*x^24 - 440887391*x^23 - 619953467*x^22 - 759287579*x^21 - 769732749*x^20 - 615411290*x^19 - 188855077*x^18 + 195257074*x^17 + 816189158*x^16 + 975709620*x^15 + 1245774861*x^14 + 994507400*x^13 + 848145046*x^12 + 498165547*x^11 + 300152707*x^10 + 123338657*x^9 + 50081544*x^8 + 11654604*x^7 + 2632578*x^6 + 1287*x^5 + 495*x^4 + 165*x^3 + 45*x^2 + 9*x + 1)*y^9
	+ x^6*(65780*x^40 - 41860*x^39 + 196430*x^38 + 220025*x^37 + 346073*x^36 + 818024*x^35 + 1483820*x^34 + 2746518*x^33 + 5311222*x^32 + 10361382*x^31 + 20166604*x^30 - 37973665*x^29 + 167289992*x^28 - 339432476*x^27 + 450009657*x^26 - 612168864*x^25 + 339314172*x^24 - 371701914*x^23 - 61434230*x^22 - 79789829*x^21 - 145088138*x^20 - 40442462*x^19 - 75361131*x^18 - 59617735*x^17 - 74422802*x^16 - 84025660*x^15 - 86027388*x^14 - 68810470*x^13 - 28875409*x^12 + 25077794*x^11 + 96194599*x^10 + 132705545*x^9 + 176974221*x^8 + 151317660*x^7 + 140654800*x^6 + 86033879*x^5 + 57840320*x^4 + 24411856*x^3 + 11331663*x^2 + 2672901*x + 736281)*y^8
	- x^6*(14950*x^38 + 650*x^37 + 36725*x^36 + 65377*x^35 + 106560*x^34 + 205519*x^33 + 380502*x^32 + 687309*x^31 + 1238469*x^30 + 2224602*x^29 + 3957346*x^28 - 11708895*x^27 + 34958823*x^26 - 76632112*x^25 + 81634968*x^24 - 114712709*x^23 + 49553347*x^22 - 61473782*x^21 - 8554076*x^20 - 16616166*x^19 - 15083050*x^18 - 8454588*x^17 - 8887212*x^16 - 7745070*x^15 - 7227998*x^14 - 5399352*x^13 - 1827197*x^12 + 3583101*x^11 + 10031747*x^10 + 15471276*x^9 + 20292513*x^8 + 19274086*x^7 + 18782696*x^6 + 12369566*x^5 + 9101660*x^4 + 4023929*x^3 + 2120538*x^2 + 511357*x + 169911)*y^7
	+ x^6*(2600*x^36 + 1950*x^35 + 6383*x^34 + 13333*x^33 + 23486*x^32 + 41450*x^31 + 72688*x^30 + 125114*x^29 + 211130*x^28 + 349667*x^27 + 568226*x^26 - 2933461*x^25 + 6016566*x^24 - 14080408*x^23 + 11819838*x^22 - 16870838*x^21 + 5446680*x^20 - 7539146*x^19 - 889358*x^18 - 1967431*x^17 - 1026711*x^16 - 690255*x^15 - 420825*x^14 - 185337*x^13 + 126407*x^12 + 531607*x^11 + 1015304*x^10 + 1506463*x^9 + 1887376*x^8 + 1984501*x^7 + 1954311*x^6 + 1440223*x^5 + 1122995*x^4 + 540568*x^3 + 316435*x^2 + 80185*x + 31465)*y^6
	- x^6*(325*x^34 + 481*x^33 + 982*x^32 + 1952*x^31 + 3513*x^30 + 5965*x^29 + 9789*x^28 + 15647*x^27 + 24382*x^26 + 37018*x^25 + 54760*x^24 - 579014*x^23 + 842407*x^22 - 2035033*x^21 + 1322883*x^20 - 1855835*x^19 + 433756*x^18 - 630665*x^17 - 41599*x^16 - 110192*x^15 - 9570*x^14 + 12934*x^13 + 42861*x^12 + 68357*x^11 + 95949*x^10 + 122665*x^9 + 144602*x^8 + 156926*x^7 + 153872*x^6 + 128744*x^5 + 103175*x^4 + 56903*x^3 + 35786*x^2 + 10025*x + 4495)*y^5
	+ x^6*(26*x^32 + 58*x^31 + 109*x^30 + 194*x^29 + 328*x^28 + 526*x^27 + 803*x^26 + 1174*x^25 + 1654*x^24 + 2258*x^23 + 3001*x^22 - 87492*x^21 + 93884*x^20 - 220766*x^19 + 108683*x^18 - 141543*x^17 + 23963*x^16 - 30454*x^15 + 2337*x^14 + 889*x^13 + 5118*x^12 + 6292*x^11 + 7375*x^10 + 8271*x^9 + 8884*x^8 + 9118*x^7 + 8877*x^6 + 8065*x^5 + 6586*x^4 + 4344*x^3 + 2839*x^2 + 949*x + 465)*y^4
	- x^6*(x^30 + 3*x^29 + 6*x^28 + 10*x^27 + 15*x^26 + 21*x^25 + 28*x^24 + 36*x^23 + 45*x^22 + 55*x^21 + 66*x^20 - 9802*x^19 + 7891*x^18 - 16815*x^17 + 5867*x^16 - 6587*x^15 + 826*x^14 - 491*x^13 + 358*x^12 + 381*x^11 + 394*x^10 + 397*x^9 + 390*x^8 + 373*x^7 + 346*x^6 + 309*x^5 + 262*x^4 + 205*x^3 + 138*x^2 + 61*x + 31)*y^3
	- x^6*(780*x^17 - 440*x^16 + 802*x^15 - 155*x^14 + 139*x^13 - 13*x^12 - 12*x^11 - 11*x^10 - 10*x^9 - 9*x^8 - 8*x^7 - 7*x^6 - 6*x^5 - 5*x^4 - 4*x^3 - 3*x^2 - 2*x - 1)*y^2
	+ 2*x^19*(20*x^2 - 6*x + 9)*y
	- x^19;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
